name: Cream Cheese Pie Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. CREAM BUTTER, CREAM CHEESE and VINEGAR together in a mixer or processor until smooth.
2. Reduce speed to low and add the flour. Mix until just incorporated.
3. Remove the dough from the mixer and form into 3 balls.
4. Wrap each ball in plastic wrap and chill for one hour before using.
5. UNCOOKED DOUGH CAN BE FROZEN FOR UP TO 2 MONTHS. Freeze uncooked balls of dough or freeze dough in pie tins.
6. MAKES 3 (10-inch) PIES.
